name: Regal Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Combine eggs, oil, and vanilla; pour into the well.
4. Beat with a large wooden spoon until the batter is smooth.
5. Gently fold in grated carrots and chopped pecans.
6. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until the top springs back when lightly pressed with fingertips.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack for 1 hour.
10. Carefully turn out the cake onto a serving plate.
11. Frost with orange cream cheese frosting.
This recipe was shared by Donna Partigianoni of Leesville, LA, who often brought it to potluck dinners at my church.
